revision.comment: Bot: add link reference from Baekje King Rizeon
revision.text:
[[Baekje King Rizeon]] linked to {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}}
[[Category:jawiki resolution pages|1]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Baekje King Rizeon" to "Kudara no Konikishi Rizen"
revision.text:
[[Kudara no Konikishi Rizen]] linked to {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}}
[[Category:jawiki resolution pages|1]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[天応]] to [[Jawiki resolution:天応]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: move to Jawiki resolution ns
Immanuelle moved page [[Jawiki resolution:天応]] to [[Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: move to Jawiki resolution ns
Bot: set tracking category for 6 ill-links
Text replacement - "|天応|" to "|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|qq=}}{{citation needed|"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude> [[Category:pages]]

#redirect[[en:Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
revision.text: redirect[[:en:Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Jawiki resolution:Jawiki resolution:天応]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>
